subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1915
subcodes.first_line: Through the tongue of His Manifestation, God has revealed: “O Son of Spirit! The best beloved of all things in My sight is Justice..." ...people that investigate claims for themselves learn the fundamental truth. We walk in a path that has no interest in other people's affairs.
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند بلسان مظهر وحی خود فرموده " یا ابن الروح احب الاشیاٌ عندی الانصاف
subcodes.subjects: @independent investigation of truth; reality, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @family of Muhammad; early figures in Islam, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
